content:
### New Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/scope_hoist_v2.rs` (~500L) | True module flattening: ESM-only candidate analysis, top-level variable renaming with module prefix, require() → direct reference replacement, cross-module constant inlining |
| `examples/hn-clone/` | Second real-world React app (Hacker News clone) for validation with Playwright smoke tests |

### Modified Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/scope_hoist.rs` (209L) | Refactor: delegate to scope_hoist_v2 for ESM modules, keep current IIFE approach as fallback for CJS |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/mangle.rs` (665L) | Support flattened scope: accept module-prefixed variables, mangle across former module boundaries |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/minify.rs` (637L) | Fix char-index-as-byte-offset bug for multi-byte UTF-8 (#904) |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/fold.rs` (706L) | Fix char-index-as-byte-offset bug for multi-byte UTF-8 (#904) |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/tree_shake.rs` (619L) | Fix char-index-as-byte-offset bug if present (#904) |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/mod.rs` (542L) | Integrate scope_hoist_v2, add build verification step for real-world apps |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/pkg_manager/registry.rs` (227L) | Migrate disk cache from ~/.jet-store/.metadata/ to ~/.cache/jet/metadata/ (XDG), auto-migrate existing data (#905) |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/pkg_manager/resolver.rs` (650L) | Fix remaining resolver bugs: version conflict hoisting, pre-release edge cases (#883) |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/pkg_manager/mod.rs` (527L) | Optimize true cold install: pipeline metadata fetch with download, reduce sequential phases (#881) |
| `install.sh` | Already fixed — codesign after cp (#906) |
| `.claude/skills/cclab-build-debug` | Add codesign -s - step (#906) |
| `.claude/skills/cclab-release-patch` | Add codesign -s - step (#906) |
